title: Radhe
subTitle: Radhe, a daredevil encounter specialist of the Mumbai Police force, vows to knock down the crime syndicate led by an evil drug lord.

title: Hamari Adhuri Kahani
subTitle: Half a decade after her husband went missing, Vasudha, a single mother, falls for Aarav, a hotelier. However, her missing husband, Hari, returns, thereby creating a rift between the two lovers.

title: Aattral
subTitle: Arjun's father, who is a mechanic, manages to get INR 10 lakh to fulfil Arjun's dream of developing an automatic car. However, the former is robbed and killed by a mysterious man.

title: Kismat Konnection
subTitle: Raj, an out-of-luck architect, and Priya, an out-of-love social activist, find themselves connected in a strange way by destiny.

title: Vikram Vetal
subTitle: King Vikramaditya is told twenty-five stories by a ghost, Vetal. He must find a moral lesson in each of these stories.

title: Cirkus
subTitle: Two sets of identical twins are separated at birth and grow in two different cities. Years later, chaos ensues when one set of twins decides to visit the town where the other runs a circus.

title: Jhoom Naacho Gao Yaaron
subTitle: Ganesh, a handicapped dancer, got injured because of Anthony, his rival. Later, two dancers train under him to defeat him.

title: Akhanda
subTitle: When the nefarious Varadarajulu plans to attack Murali Krishna, an ardent devotee of Lord Shiva, Akhanda leaves no stone unturned to defeat the evil.

title: Dhamaal
subTitle: Four lazy friends learn about a hidden treasure in Goa and set out to find it. However, a police inspector learns about their plan and begins to pursue them.

title: Krrish 3
subTitle: Krishna lives happily with his wife Priya and his father. However, their peaceful life is shattered when Kaal abducts Priya.

title: I
subTitle: A bodybuilder and successful model plans revenge after his enemies inject him with a substance that deforms his body.

title: Forensic
subTitle: When a psychotic murderer sets out on a killing spree, Samuel, a medico-legal advisor, uses his forensic skills to unravel the truth behind the heinous deeds.

title: Forensic
subTitle: When a psychotic murderer sets out on a killing spree, Samuel, a medico-legal advisor, uses his forensic skills to unravel the truth behind the heinous deeds.

title: Ajab Gazabb Love
subTitle: Rajveer, a rich man, falls in love with Madhuri. However, he soon realises that she detests affluent people and in order to win her heart, he, along with his family, pretends to be poor.

title: Chhatriwali
subTitle: While struggling to find work, Sanya accepts a unique job and ends up leading a quiet revolution in how her community thinks about health and responsibility.

title: Sarkar 3
subTitle: Determined to protect public interest and his own authority, Sarkar finds himself locked in a cat-and-mouse game with his adversaries, both external and internal.

title: Pokiri Raja The Great
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Bareilly Ki Barfi
subTitle: In the small-town of Bareilly, a free-spirited Bitti hates that she is being pressured into getting married. But when she reads a book that reflects her life, she sets out to find its author.

title: Genius
subTitle: An orphan with a genius mind hatches a plan to avenge the killing of his colleagues in order to live in peace with the one he loves.

title: Uri: The Surgical Strike
subTitle: Major Vihaan Singh Shergill of the Indian Army leads a covert operation against a group of militants who attacked a base in Uri, Kashmir, in 2016 and killed many soldiers.

title: Indian
subTitle: Police officer Raj Azad arrests terrorist Wasim Khan and prepares to interrogate him. However, his father-in-law mysteriously dies, after which he is blamed for his death and goes on the run.

title: Sandwich
subTitle: Sher Singh has two wives, Nisha and Sweety, and juggles his time between them. However, when his two wives cross paths, his troubles increase manifold leading to hilarious situations.

title: Khatta Meetha
subTitle: A seemingly corrupt petty contractor faces challenges from the local municipality, his family, his employees, as well as a former girlfriend and her family.

title: Bengal Tiger
subTitle: Akash, a simple man, falls in love with politician Gajapathi's daughter, Meera. However, on learning the identity of Akash's father, Gajapathi suspects that he wants revenge for a past transgression.

title: Bengal Tiger
subTitle: Akash, a simple man, falls in love with politician Gajapathi's daughter, Meera. However, on learning the identity of Akash's father, Gajapathi suspects that he wants revenge for a past transgression.

title: Kahaani 2: Durga Rani Singh
subTitle: When her disabled daughter is kidnapped, Vidya attempts to save her but a car knocks her off. When the police gets involved in the case, Vidya's mysterious past is revealed.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Don
subTitle: A high-stakes secret operation requires a hillbilly look-alike to take Mark Don Donald's place as an elusive drug trafficker with too many targets on his back.

title: Bal Hanuman
subTitle: A mischievous Hanuman grows up to become a heroic being who fights all evil creatures and helps Lord Rama in rescuing Sita from Lanka.

title: Thank God
subTitle: An egotistical real estate broker comes face-to-face with God after meeting with an accident. Soon, he is forced to play a game that will put him either in heaven or hell.

title: Navarathna
subTitle: Moksha, a photographer, finds an ancient necklace that brings ill fate to those who wear it. Under the guise of capturing rare birds, she goes into a forest and plans to dispose of the ornament.

title: Simmba
subTitle: Inspector Simmba is a corrupt officer who works for a major smuggler. He finds his values challenged as the gangster's brothers assault his sworn sister.

title: Aa Ab Laut Chalein
subTitle: After graduating from a university in India, an unemployed man decides to try his luck in New York and gets caught in a love triangle between an equally unlucky girl and a rich girl.

title: Commando - A One Man Army
subTitle: Caught in the diplomatic crossfire between India and China, Captain Karan Dogra fights a harrowing battle for survival and makes a new enemy by rescuing a damsel in distress.

title: Mr. India
subTitle: Hoping to make the world a better place for orphaned children, a compassionate street musician takes on a power-hungry crime boss with the help of a cloaking device.

title: Crocodile Island
subTitle: The stranded passengers must fight against man-eating crocodiles after their plane makes an emergency landing on a remote island.
